meta.title: {product} — grown at Janson Coffee
meta.description: Trace this exact lot of {product} from our farm in Volcán, Panama, all the way to your cup.

public.eyebrow: From our farm to your cup

eudr.heading: Forest check
eudr.compliant: This lot is geolocated and confirmed deforestation-free.
eudr.incomplete: We are still finishing the origin mapping for this lot.
eudr.no-origin: The origin map for this lot is not ready yet.

crew.heading: Picked by hand
crew.body: Hand-picked at peak ripeness by the families who farm with us.
crew.empty: Picking crew details are being added.

reserve.heading: Two hundred hectares of cloud forest
reserve.body: Half of the Janson estate is left wild for the quetzal and the cloud forest it nests in. The coffee grows in the shade of that forest, the way it has since 1990.

cta.heading: Want this exact coffee?
cta.sub: Every bag carries the lot you just read about.

trace.scan: You scanned this bag to trace your coffee. Thank you for drinking it with us.

error.title: We could not find that bag
error.description: This trace link is not active. Check the code on your bag, or visit our shop.

page.title: Provenance
page.subtitle: Curate the public trace page behind each bag's QR. Nothing goes public until you publish it.

empty.title: No lot-linked bags yet
empty.description: Create a SKU in the shop catalog first, then publish its trace page here.

form.title: Publish trace page
form.slugHint: The path after /p/ . Lowercase, words joined by dashes.
form.storyHint: A few warm lines about this lot. This is the only free text shown to the public.
form.storyPlaceholder: Grown on Quetzal Ridge at 1,650m, hand-picked at peak ripeness.
form.unpublishBody: Visitors who scan the bag will no longer see the trace page. You can publish it again any time.

errors.slugRequired: Add a public link before publishing.
errors.exists: That public link is already used by another bag.
errors.unknownSku: We could not find that bag for your farm.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
